description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and a prominent, greenish-brown stem at the top. The pumpkin features a carved face on one side, displaying menacing, angular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, typical of a Halloween jack-o'-lantern. The carving is deep, with large cutouts that reveal the hollow interior, and the edges of the cutouts are slightly irregular, adding to the hand-carved appearance. The pumpkin's body is segmented with natural grooves and has a slightly flattened base, allowing it to sit stably on flat surfaces. The stem is thick, ridged, and curves slightly, providing a naturalistic touch. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin appears clean and unadorned aside from the facial carving.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a greenish-brown stem and a jagged, menacing face cut into one side, resembling a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown from the back, displaying its smooth, segmented orange surface and the full stem, with no visible carvings.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the pumpkin's stem and a partial glimpse of the carved face, with the jagged mouth and eye cutouts visible on the right.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the carved face, featuring sharp, angular eyes and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth, fully exposing the hollow interior.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the stem and the edge of the facial cutouts, with the rest of the pumpkin's surface uncarved.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a traditional jack-o'-lantern carving with angular, slanted eyes and a wide, jagged mouth filled with pointed teeth. The style is classic and expressive, with deep cutouts and sharp edges, giving the face a menacing, Halloween-themed appearance.
